scripts.build: mkdir -p public && cp -r html css js images *.html *.json *.txt *.xml *.png *.ico public/ 2>/dev/null || xcopy /E /I /Y html public\html && xcopy /E /I /Y css public\css && xcopy /E /I /Y js public\js && xcopy /E /I /Y images public\images && copy *.html public\ && copy *.json public\ && copy *.txt public\ && copy *.xml public\
